rows.author: dotey
rows.content:
我做 AI 翻译这件事，前前后后折腾了快两年。从最早手写提示词，到现在用 Agent 自动分块、并行翻译、审校润色，中间踩了不少坑，也攒了不少经验。最近把这些经验沉淀成了一个可复用的翻译 Skill。

先说说翻译这个场景为什么比看上去要复杂。提示词本身很简单，“把这段话翻译成中文”谁都会写。 https://t.co/ODsBHbau11
rows.bio: Prompt Engineer, dedicated to learning and disseminating knowledge about AI, software engineering, and engineering management.

npx skills add joeseesun/skill-publisher https://t.co/NvSx5rAjgf

rows.author: vista8
rows.content:
让Claude Code写了一个Youtube浏览+字幕或视频下载的Skill。

安装指令：
npx skills add joeseesun/yt-search-download

比如我说：“查找Lex Fridman油管更新”

自动展示Youtube名字和链接，播放量等信息。

只需说下载第1个视频（字幕），就完成自动下载。

然后可以组合其他Skill处理 https://t.co/2o3kqivJpI

rows.author: vista8
rows.content:
很多人说Anthropic官方的Skill Creator变强了。

但没人告诉你如何更新。

只需要跟Claude Code说：

安装更新https://t.co/gVg70LSOWi

这次更新多了 run_eval.py, run_loop.py, aggregate_benchmark.py 三个文件。

应该就是大家说的自动评估Skill，循环更新优化的功能。 https://t.co/lM1ZPzl3HA

The same cannot always be said for any of the other players.

rows.content:
别着急吹 GPT-5.4，跟 Opus 4.6 还是有差距。

目前我初步用下来的感觉：

1. 写作依然不行，比GPT-5.2看起来有点进步，但离Opus 4.6 还有点远

2. 过度思考，一个简单问题能思考半天

3. https://t.co/bC4c1qABvJ

rows.author: emollick
rows.content:
It was fun the first time I got a phone call from my OpenClaw, but, in general, I don't trust it enough (security, obviously, but also too squirrely & unstable) to do anything too useful for me, for now

Does show you the value of new control surfaces for AI agents, which is cool

rows.author: DeepLearningAI
rows.content:
There’s a lot of noise around “learning AI.”

New tools, new frameworks, and new model releases appear constantly. It can feel like you’re always behind!

But when you look at how many modern AI systems are actually built today, a clear pattern emerges.

Many real-world AI https://t.co/TDgq76mi6w
rows.bio: We are an education technology company with the mission to grow and connect the global AI community.

All programming languages are the same

They all compile into CPU code when you run them

With AI there is even less difference between them for the programmer

Use any language, it's all mostly the same!

It could run 4 times in the blink of an eye

I can make it faster but I mostly code, not optimize

rows.author: hamelhusain
rows.content:
People are misunderstanding her. 

It’s important to remember that a variant of semantic search is still happening 

1. User writes a query 
2. You send that query to a LLM with semantic understanding that knows what other tokens in latent space are similar to the query 
3. LLM
rows.bio:
Bringing data science back to AI -  https://t.co/Zrmp6LRd9c

About Me: https://t.co/P6WyeKkyTa

"what is the research org agent code that produces improvements on nanochat the fastest?"

this is the new meta.

rows.author: karpathy
rows.content: nanochat now trains GPT-2 capability model in just 2 hours on a single 8XH100 node (down from ~3 hours 1 month ago). Getting a lot closer to ~interactive! A bunch of tuning and features (fp8) went in but the biggest difference was a switch of the dataset from FineWeb-edu to https://t.co/qragh6hJL6
rows.bio: I like to train large deep neural nets. Previously Director of AI @ Tesla, founding team @ OpenAI, PhD @ Stanford.

My guess is that you can get quite far even in the current paradigm by introducing a number of memory ops as "tools" and throwing them
rows.bio: I like to train large deep neural nets. Previously Director of AI @ Tesla, founding team @ OpenAI, PhD @ Stanford.

rows.author: DeepLearningAI
rows.content:
Twice a week, Data Points brings you the latest AI news, tools, models, and research in brief. 

In our latest edition, you’ll find updates on Anthropic, Google, Alibaba, and more.

rows.author: dongxi_nlp
rows.content:
Real Money, Fake Models: Deceptive Model Claims in Shadow APIs

https://t.co/I7IPw8tI0k
rows.bio: Prev. PhD @Stockholm_Uni | Alumni @KTHuniversity @uppsalauni Sharing insights on AI, autonomous agents, and large language & reasoning models

rows.author: dongxi_nlp
rows.content:
「 Shadow APIs 」

Shadow APIs：声称提供官方前沿 LLMs 的第三方接口，绕过定价、支付和地域限制。

这些服务，是否真的提供了与官方API相同的模型？
研究证明，Shadow APIs 存在模型降级嫌疑，并不可信。

似乎，Shadow APIs 提供商通过routing，在利用模型差，赚取巨额利润。

是这样么？ https://t.co/1fyDDGvtW0
rows.bio: Prev. PhD @Stockholm_Uni | Alumni @KTHuniversity @uppsalauni Sharing insights on AI, autonomous agents, and large language & reasoning models

rows.author: hamelhusain
rows.content:
Another point - your personality and world view are often significantly changed by having children.  

This policy creates a blindspot in terms of "understanding your customer" in many cases.  For example, you appreciate mobile apps way more after having children.
rows.bio:
Bringing data science back to AI -  https://t.co/Zrmp6LRd9c

About Me: https://t.co/P6WyeKkyTa

rows.content:

For what it is worth, I take no money from OpenAI or any other AI lab, and they never pre-approve or know what I will write.

rows.author: OpenAI
rows.content:
We're publishing a new evaluation suite and research paper on Chain-of-Thought (CoT) Controllability.

We find that GPT-5.4 Thinking shows low ability to obscure its reasoning—suggesting CoT monitoring remains a useful safety tool. https://t.co/isZkNkPXZm
rows.bio: OpenAI’s mission is to ensure that artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity. We’re hiring: https://t.co/dJGr6LgzPA

rows.author: deedydas
rows.content:
GPT 5.4 Pro just crushed the hardest math benchmark, FrontierMath Tier 4, with 38%.

These 50 research level math problems can take mathematicians weeks to solve.

A year ago, the best was 2% (o3). The best open source model is 4.2% (Kimi K2.5)

Insanely impressive. https://t.co/9MqgYmDIOA
rows.bio: Partner @MenloVentures. Formerly founding team @glean, @google Search. @cornell CS. Investor @AnthropicAI, @GoodfireAI, @OpenRouter, @WisprFlow, @_inception_ai

rows.author: venturetwins
rows.content:
AI isn't killing Hollywood. 

Everyone can now generate a video. But few can craft a story that people will spend hours watching.

AI tools will make it faster and cheaper to make movies and TV - shifting up the supply curve of quality content + allowing more stories to be told.
rows.bio: Partner @a16z AI 🤖 and twin to @omooretweets | Investor in @elevenlabsio, @bfl_ml, @hedra_labs, @krea_ai, @MireloAI, @ShizukuAILabs, @wabi, @WaveFormsAI

rows.author: emollick
rows.content:
Given the GDPval benchmark for GPT-5.4, I've updated this chart, the new model ties or beats humans as judged by other experts at professional tasks 82% of the time

If you give a 7 hour task to AI, even with failure rates and the need to check results, you'd save 4h 38m average https://t.co/U4PQSArQo2
rows.bio:
Professor @Wharton studying AI, innovation & startups. Democratizing education using tech
Book: https://t.co/CSmipbJ2jV
Substack: https://t.co/UIBhxu4bgq

rows.author: paulg
rows.content: @seekgood1 This one did take a lot of research. I don't think you can let research sit for any amount of time before you use it though. Only half of what you learned is actually written down in the notes. If that. So if you came back later, half your research would be gone.

rows.author: dotey
rows.content:
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4，定位为专业工作场景的旗舰模型，同步推出面向高复杂任务的 GPT-5.4 Pro 版本。

这次发布的最大亮点是 GPT-5.4 成为 OpenAI 首个原生支持"电脑操控"（Computer Use）的通用模型——也就是说，它可以像人一样通过截图、点击鼠标、敲击键盘来操作真实的电脑界面。

在
rows.bio: Prompt Engineer, dedicated to learning and disseminating knowledge about AI, software engineering, and engineering management.

rows.author: op7418
rows.content:
Open AI 牛皮 GPT-5.4 发布了，API 和 Codex 可以直接开启 100 万上下文。

而且只有超出272K 上下文窗口的部分会用两倍额度计费，比 Claude 良心太多了！

计算机原生使用能力和复杂任务的智能体便秘能力大幅提升。

针对耗时较长、工具繁多的工作流程，提供更高效的推理

而且这次 GPT-5.4 https://t.co/nj4IMwOXry

rows.author: emollick
rows.content:
Had early access to GPT-5.4 and Pro. 

They are very good. One fun illustration of progress, this is the same prompt I used in GPT-4 below (making a 3D space inspired by Piranesi) now in GPT-5.4 Pro. There were no  errors, made in a single prompt plus one to "make it better." https://t.co/7Vgmc60SKc
rows.bio:
Professor @Wharton studying AI, innovation & startups. Democratizing education using tech
Book: https://t.co/CSmipbJ2jV
Substack: https://t.co/UIBhxu4bgq

rows.author: sama
rows.content:
GPT-5.4 is launching, available now in the API and Codex and rolling out over the course of the day in ChatGPT.

It's much better at knowledge work and web search, and it has native computer use capabilities.

You can steer it mid-response, and it supports 1m tokens of context. https://t.co/DUrHIhXhzc

rows.author: fchollet
rows.content: The reason congenitally blind people are just as intelligent as we are despite ingesting a lot less "data" throughout their lives is that they navigate the same world as we do (i.e. same complexity reservoir) and the conscious processing bitrate they extract from it is the same
rows.bio: Co-founder @ndea. Co-founder @arcprize. Creator of Keras and ARC-AGI. Author of 'Deep Learning with Python'.

给AI用的Youtube工具，一切都打通了，爽啊！

这个yt-browse Skill可以把Youtube变成cli模式。

支持模糊搜索视频，按播放量排序。

再用自己整合的anything-to-NotebookLM Skill上传Notebooklm加工处理。

rows.author: fchollet
rows.content: We underestimate how much "abstract" thought is just repurposed sensorimotor control circuitry. A lot of reasoning is essentially about moving through idea-space the way we move through physical space.
rows.bio: Co-founder @ndea. Co-founder @arcprize. Creator of Keras and ARC-AGI. Author of 'Deep Learning with Python'.

rows.author: vista8
rows.content:
发现用Claude Agent SDK打造的工具产品越来越多。

一晚上随便测了几个AI工具，全都是基于它搞的。

有笔记软件Moss，有一个Markdown管理开发任务的Moment，有专门为多 Agent开发的工具SUPERSET。

Anthropic公司不管怎么说，产品力是相当可以。 https://t.co/GOAvcB6B2c
rows.bio:
喜欢摇滚乐、爱钓鱼的PM
网站：https://t.co/vnUpLt752o

rows.author: vista8
rows.content:
Moss又是一款免费的本地优先的Markdown笔记软件。

亮点是支持Claude Cli，第三方模型API也可以用。

界面设计非常清爽，支持插入可编辑的图表、内嵌HTML等。

可理解成没有插件的轻量级的Obsidian+Claudian

下载地址见评论区 https://t.co/e9Nz7CS5dR

rows.content: Excited to share the latest Olmo model: Olmo Hybrid. This is a model with gated delta net (GDN) layers in a 3:1 ratio with full attention. It follows lots of other developments like Qwen 3.5 and Kimi Linear. It's incredible timing to release a fully open model so people can study https://t.co/1PzyLtxF73

It follows lots of other developments like Qwen 3.5 and Kimi Linear. It's incredible timing to release a fully open model so people can study https://t.co/1PzyLtxF73
rows.bio:
Research @allen_ai, reasoning, open models, RL(VR/HF)...

rows.author: allen_ai
rows.content:
Key finding: hybrid models are substantially more data-efficient than transformers.

We show this through rigorous theory + controlled experiments. On MMLU, Olmo Hybrid matches Olmo 3’s accuracy using 49% fewer tokens—roughly 2× efficiency. https://t.co/cI2KMfJlhJ
rows.bio:
Breakthrough AI to solve the world's biggest problems.

rows.author: allen_ai
rows.content:
Olmo Hybrid’s gains hold across pretraining evals.

After pretraining and mid-training, Olmo Hybrid outperforms Olmo 3 in every primary evaluation domain. It wins big on long-context too—on RULER 64k, performance jumps from 70.9% to 85.0%. 🚀 https://t.co/m6tfTcXEFK
rows.bio:
Breakthrough AI to solve the world's biggest problems.

rows.author: allen_ai
rows.content:
Olmo Hybrid uses a 3:1 pattern—three Gated DeltaNet layers followed by one attention layer.

This replaces 75% of attention with linear recurrence while keeping attention frequent enough to recover details the recurrent state compresses away. https://t.co/J1E9IhXFoK
rows.bio:
Breakthrough AI to solve the world's biggest problems.

rows.author: emollick
rows.content:
It is increasingly clear that the constraint is going to be compute, just as the AI labs warned.

The token requirements for agentic work are high, making using frontier agents only cost efficient for high value tasks. There are tons of other opportunities waiting for lower costs
rows.bio:
Professor @Wharton studying AI, innovation & startups. Democratizing education using tech
Book: https://t.co/CSmipbJ2jV
Substack: https://t.co/UIBhxu4bgq

rows.author: DeepLearningAI
rows.content:
What should you learn next?

It's obvious that we should all learn more about AI, but how do you know what to focus on? 

To answer this question, @DeepLearningAI has released a free AI Skill Builder tool that gives you a full picture of where you're at and what to focus on to https://t.co/3d7291wObA
rows.bio: We are an education technology company with the mission to grow and connect the global AI community.

rows.author: venturetwins
rows.content:
Really impressed with the new video feature in @NotebookLM. 

I asked for a history of Disneyland. 

It kicked off a deep search, pulled 58 sources, used them to write a script, and generated a 5 minute video with a mix of real and AI visuals.

How it works + a clip 👇 https://t.co/4giYY3Zq5p

另外推荐 Opus 4.6，目前效果最好
https://t.co/HRNF1G5m99

rows.author: natolambert
rows.content:
Happy when you see junior people early on in their journey, support them a little, and they succeed a ton. 

He was the first and is still the only outside contributor to @interconnectsai - is a high bar!
rows.bio:
Research @allen_ai, reasoning, open models, RL(VR/HF)...
Contact via email. 
Writes @interconnectsai, @readsail
Wrote The RLHF Book,
🏔️🏃‍♂️

rows.author: fchollet
rows.content:
I keep reading this take (below) every few months, presented as if extremely profound, and it is just offensively dumb. It confuses data and information, it ignores the fact that not all information is equally valuable, and it ignores the importance of retention rate.

As a https://t.co/7csKifAkwx
rows.bio: Co-founder @ndea. Co-founder @arcprize. Creator of Keras and ARC-AGI. Author of 'Deep Learning with Python'.

rows.author: dongxi_nlp
rows.content:
@lidangzzz 其实因为计算语言学的历史原因，直到如今，很多欧美院校的 NLP 硕士阶段的学位，都是 Master of Art。而读计算语言学的同学，很多本科阶段是纯语言学的。

虽然是 Master of Art，但要求其实非常严格，例如只允许使用 linux 做实验，只允许使用 latex 写报告，甚至强烈要求使用 emacs 做代码编辑器。
rows.bio: Prev. PhD @Stockholm_Uni | Alumni @KTHuniversity @uppsalauni Sharing insights on AI, autonomous agents, and large language & reasoning models

rows.author: dotey
rows.content:
高质量长文，推荐阅读。这文章只有长期使用 AI 和本身有很好写作功底的才写的出来，至于有没有 AI 辅助一点不重要，甚至于我也看不出来。

人文工作者如果用好 AI 跟程序员用 AI 一样可以极大的放大自身能力，把很多粗活累活交给 AI 干，自己可以聚焦于更高维度的事情。
rows.bio: Prompt Engineer, dedicated to learning and disseminating knowledge about AI, software engineering, and engineering management.

人文工作者如果用好 AI 跟程序员用 AI 一样可以极大的放大自身能力，把很多粗活累活交给 AI 干，自己可以聚焦于更高维度的事情。
rows.bio: Prompt Engineer, dedicated to learning and disseminating knowledge about AI, software engineering, and engineering management.

rows.author: op7418
rows.content:
我自己实现的这套给 Claude Code 或者 Agent SDK 做 IM 连接的架构，我觉得是比较好的。

同时，它可能比市面上所有给 Claude Code 做 IM 连接的架构都要好，所以我可能会把它拆出来开源

如果大家想做类似的产品、工具，或者有需要的话，可以说一声。如果多的话，我就把它拆出来开源，做成一个 SDK。 https://t.co/HJqT967T1H

rows.author: deedydas
rows.content:
So many startups think their engineers are "cracked" but have no idea what that really means. 

This team of 5 19yr olds built a 30 petabyte storage cluster in SF for ~$500k to get a 40x cheaper AWS S3 as a side quest to store 90M hours of video. 

Now, that's cracked. https://t.co/C1L175DKNe
rows.bio: Partner @MenloVentures. Formerly founding team @glean, @google Search. @cornell CS. Investor @AnthropicAI, @GoodfireAI, @OpenRouter, @WisprFlow, @_inception_ai

rows.content:
灰度到了 Claude Code 的语音模式：

1. 装之前、用之前需要先装一个工具，然后它会给你引导
2. 装完之后直接重启
3. 重启完了以后，输入 /voice 启动，按住空格说话

试了一下，目前不支持中文。 https://t.co/hAWZnR2R3Q
rows.bio:
关注人工智能、LLM 、 AI 图像视频和设计（Interested in AI, LLM, Stable Diffusion, and design）

rows.author: emollick
rows.content:
The deciding factor is whether an executive is willing to assume risk. If the answer is no, then risk reduction forces in the organization (IT and Legal among them) have every incentive to avoid anything that might even be rumored to cause a problem.

It is a leadership question.
